name: Cube Miner
author: Poki
description: Cube Miner is a platform puzzle game where you’re stuck in prison, and the only way out is through the mines! Gather resources, trade with different merchants, upgrade your gear, and use dynamite to blast your way through hidden areas. Eat cakes for a boost, pump up your mine generator for faster extraction, and uncover secret escape routes. How soon will you be able to escape? How to play Cube Miner? Click to mine. Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Cube Miner? Cube Miner is created by Platonov Developer. Play their other games on Poki: Digger Escape ! How can I play Cube Miner for free? You can play Cube Miner for free on Poki. Can I play Cube Miner on mobile devices and desktop? Cube Miner can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
